chunks.title: Recollection of Past Deliverance
chunks.reason: The psalmist recounts God's past victories and the community's historical trust in Him.

chunks.title: Complaint of Present Humiliation
chunks.reason: A lament describing the current state of rejection and shame despite God's previous faithfulness.

chunks.title: Defense of Covenant Faithfulness
chunks.reason: The speaker argues that their suffering is not due to forgotten idols or broken covenant.

chunks.title: Supplication for Intervention
chunks.reason: A direct plea for God to awake and redeem the people based on His lovingkindness.
